violations.description: General employee practices. — --Employee * failed to maintain a high degree of personal cleanliness or observe proper hygienic practices. - Employee observed wearing gloves and using his cell phone, and went back to preparing food without changing gloves and washing hands.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item * was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Tub of sour cream on the floor.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil * was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - scoops and ladles found in sour cream in the walk in cooler, bins of beans had scoops left in the bin.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - RTE salsa not dated with a date that it was made or a use by date.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. - vent hood missing filters.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory * was used for purpose other than handwashing. - Hand washing sink used to dump glasses of drinks.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory * was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. - Handwashing sink did not have paper towels.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - floor throughout the kitchen dirty.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Utensils scraped, preflushed, soaked (1 pt deducted)
